---
title: "Network Description"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r Libraries}
library(paxtoolsr)
library(igraph)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggraph)
library(here)
```

```{r Source}
source(here::here("R/sampling.R"))
```

```{r}
largest_subgraph <- readRDS(here::here("networks", "largest_subgraph_directed.rds"))
largest_subgraph_undirected <- readRDS(here::here("networks", "largest_subgraph_undirected.rds"))
```

```{r Edge counts}
print(paste("Edges in directed: ", ecount(largest_subgraph)))
print(paste("Edges in undirected: ", ecount(largest_subgraph_undirected)))
```

```{r}
print(paste("Nodes in graph: ", vcount(largest_subgraph)))
```


```{r Diameter}
# Calculate the diameter of the graph (undirected)
largest_subgraph_diameter <- diameter(largest_subgraph, directed = FALSE)
largest_subgraph_diameter_ids <- get_diameter(largest_subgraph, directed = FALSE)

# Find the shortest distance between the diameter endpoints
di_start <- largest_subgraph_diameter_ids[1]
di_end <- largest_subgraph_diameter_ids[length(largest_subgraph_diameter_ids)]
di_shortest_distances <- distances(largest_subgraph, v = di_start, to = di_end)

# Print results
if (largest_subgraph_diameter == di_shortest_distances) {
  print(paste("The diameter AND the shortest distance between the two extremums is:", largest_subgraph_diameter))
} else {
  print(paste("The diameter of the graph is:", largest_subgraph_diameter))
  print(paste("However, the shortest distance between the two extremums is:", di_shortest_distances))
}

# Calculate the diameter of the graph (directed)
directed_diameter <- diameter(largest_subgraph, directed = TRUE)
directed_diameter_ids <- get_diameter(largest_subgraph, directed = TRUE)

# Find the shortest distance between the diameter endpoints (directed)
di_start_directed <- directed_diameter_ids[1]
di_end_directed <- directed_diameter_ids[length(directed_diameter_ids)]
di_shortest_distances_directed <- distances(largest_subgraph, v = di_start_directed, to = di_end_directed)

# Print results
if (directed_diameter == di_shortest_distances_directed) {
  print(paste("The directed diameter AND the shortest distance between the two extremums is:", directed_diameter))
} else {
  print(paste("The directed diameter of the graph is:", directed_diameter))
  print(paste("However, the shortest distance between the two extremums is:", di_shortest_distances_directed))
}
```

```{r}
mean_path_length_undirected <- mean_distance(largest_subgraph_undirected, directed = FALSE)
path_length_distribution_undirected <- distances(largest_subgraph_undirected)

path_length_values_undirected <- path_length_distribution_undirected[lower.tri(path_length_distribution_undirected)]

# Plot undirected histogram
hist(path_length_values_undirected,
     breaks = seq(min(path_length_values_undirected), max(path_length_values_undirected), by = 1),
     main = "Path Length Distribution (Undirected)",
     xlab = "Path Length", ylab = "Proportion",
     col = "lightblue", border = "black", freq = FALSE, labels = TRUE)

# Print undirected stats
cat("Undirected mean path length:", mean_path_length_undirected, "\n")
cat("Undirected SD:", sd(path_length_values_undirected), "\n")
```

```{r Clustering Coefficients}
# Clustering Coefficients
global_clustering <- transitivity(largest_subgraph, type = "global")
local_clustering <- transitivity(largest_subgraph, type = "localaverage")

# Print statistics
print(paste("Global Clustering Coefficient: ", global_clustering))
print(paste("Average Local Clustering Coefficient: ", local_clustering))
```

```{r}
deg <- degree(largest_subgraph_undirected)              # exact degree per node
deg_df <- data.frame(degree = deg)

ggplot(deg_df, aes(x = degree)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Degree Distribution",
    x = "Degree",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
gene_pathway_list <- readRDS(here::here("pathway_info", "gene_pathway_info.rds"))
# Get the vertex names in the largest subgraph
largest_subgraph_vertices <- V(largest_subgraph)$name

# Filter edges from the original data based on vertices in the largest subgraph
largest_subgraph_edges <- gene_pathway_list %>%
  filter(
    PARTICIPANT_A %in% largest_subgraph_vertices |
    PARTICIPANT_B %in% largest_subgraph_vertices
  )

# Count unique pathways
num_pathways_largest_subgraph <- length(unique(largest_subgraph_edges$PATHWAY_NAMES))
cat("Number of unique pathways in the largest subgraph:", num_pathways_largest_subgraph, "\n")
```

```{r genes per pathway}

# Faster membership filtering
v_keep <- V(largest_subgraph_undirected)$name
v_keep <- unique(v_keep)  # just in case

largest_subgraph_edges <- gene_pathway_list %>%
  filter(PARTICIPANT_A %in% v_keep, PARTICIPANT_B %in% v_keep)

pathway_genes <- largest_subgraph_edges %>%
  group_by(PATHWAY_NAMES) %>%
  summarise(Genes = list(unique(c(PARTICIPANT_A, PARTICIPANT_B))), .groups = "drop")

pathway_stats <- pathway_genes %>%
  mutate(
    num_genes = map_int(Genes, length),
    mean_path_length = map_dbl(Genes, function(g) {
      if (length(g) <= 1) return(NA_real_)
      dm <- distances(largest_subgraph_undirected, v = g, to = g)
      vals <- dm[lower.tri(dm)]
      vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]  # protects against Inf if subset isn't connected
      if (length(vals) == 0) NA_real_ else mean(vals)
    }),
    sd_path_length = map_dbl(Genes, function(g) {
      if (length(g) <= 1) return(NA_real_)
      dm <- distances(largest_subgraph_undirected, v = g, to = g)
      vals <- dm[lower.tri(dm)]
      vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
      if (length(vals) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(vals)
    })
  )

print(pathway_stats)

saveRDS(pathway_stats, file = here::here("pathway_info", "pathway_stats.rds"), compress = "xz")

# Histogram of genes per pathway
p_hist <- ggplot(pathway_stats, aes(x = num_genes)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10, fill = "lightblue", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Number of Genes per Pathway",
    x = "Number of Genes",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_hist)

```

```{r}
deg <- degree(largest_subgraph_undirected)

node_names <- V(largest_subgraph_undirected)$name

bin_cache <- build_bin_cache(deg, node_names, max_bins = 10)

saveRDS(bin_cache, file = here::here("networks", "degree_bin_cache.rds"), compress = "xz")
```

```{r}
bin_cache$bins_5$breaks
bin_cache$bins_5$node_table

```

```{r}
cuts <- bin_cache$bins_5$breaks

deg_counts <- as.data.frame(table(deg)) %>%
  mutate(
    deg = as.integer(as.character(deg)),
    count = as.integer(Freq)
  ) %>%
  select(deg, count)

p <- ggplot(deg_counts, aes(x = deg, y = count)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9, fill = "grey80", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cuts, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7, color = "red") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 50)) +
  labs(
    title = "Degree Distribution (Exact Counts per Degree, Zoomed to ≤110)",
    x = "Degree",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p)
cuts

```
